full_description: FocusMode is a productivity app that helps users stay focused and avoid distractions. It provides a set of tools to boost concentration and efficiency. With FocusMode, you can prioritize tasks, set goals, and track progress. The app also includes features such as website blockers, notification filters, and customizable work sessions to help you stay on track. Whether you're a student, professional, or entrepreneur, FocusMode can help you achieve your goals and improve your overall productivity.
